title: campanula autraniana
intro: Campanula autraniana, also known as the Bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Pyrenees mountains. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Campanula autraniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in creams and ointments.
